_comment: UPS Ground rate data for the outbound freight estimator (src/routes/shipping.js). EDIT THIS FILE to update rates/zones — no code change. SOURCES: rate grid = UPS 2025 Ground DAILY list rates (https://www.ups.com/assets/resources/webcontent/en_US/daily_rates.xlsx, sheet 'UPS Ground'); zones = origin ZIP prefix 983 (Milton WA 98354). These are PUBLISHED LIST rates = an UPPER BOUND; NWCA's negotiated contract rates are lower. For exact zones, download https://www.ups.com/media/us/currentrates/zone-csv/983.xls in a BROWSER (UPS blocks bots) and run scripts/build-ups-zone-map.js to populate zonePrefixMap.
_fuelNote: UPS Ground fuel surcharge is index-based and changes WEEKLY (Mondays). ~25.5% early June 2026. Read the live value at https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-costs-rates/fuel-surcharges and update here.
_residentialNote: Real UPS residential surcharge ~$6.10 (2025) / higher 2026; kept slightly high so customer prepays enough. Does not include Delivery Area Surcharge (DAS) for rural ZIPs (~$6.55+), which we can't determine without the UPS account/API.
_zonePrefixMapNote: EXACT destination-3-digit-prefix -> UPS Ground zone for origin 983. EMPTY until the real 983 chart is loaded (see scripts/build-ups-zone-map.js). When non-empty it takes precedence over zoneRanges and the estimate is marked rough:false.
_zoneRangesNote: APPROXIMATE fallback zones by destination ZIP-3 numeric range from origin 983 (PNW). Distance-banded, biased slightly HIGH on uncertain mid/long range. Replaced by zonePrefixMap once the exact 983.xls is loaded. While these are in use, the estimate is marked rough:true.
